commit 35ada61764ec879920d0c59bd7b2306e18d4a6db
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 03:03:44 2026 +0200

    fix(agentic-tools): RTK probe uses python3 sqlite3 instead of sqlite3 CLI
    
    sqlite3 CLI not installed on this system (only libsqlite3-0).
    Switch to python3 -c 'import sqlite3' which is always available.
    DB path /home/andrev/.local/share/rtk/rtk.db confirmed present with
    correct schema (tracking: id, cmd, original_tokens, filtered_tokens, timestamp).
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit bf1d7d05fc5e27c2111c680c53bda6d100fe00cd
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 02:58:07 2026 +0200

    fix(agentic-tools): spacing and arrow icons polish
    
    - ⚠/✅ stamps: double space before time (⚠  21:03)
    - ⚠  drift: double space for consistency
    - 🕒 git time: add space (🕒 6m)
    - 🛠 and 🏗: reduce to double space (was triple)
    - ⬇️/⬆️ → ↓/↑ (1-wide ASCII arrows, no FE0F width issues)
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit f4fdcae4b8a225261d84277a2bf812700dfe5329
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 02:51:16 2026 +0200

    fix(agentic-tools): space after ⚠/✅ in stamps, revert emoji over-padding
    
    Root cause: [⚠21:03] was the overlap, not 🔌/🕸.
    - ⚠/✅ stamps now have space before time: [⚠ 21:03] [✅ 03:10]
    - 🔌 back to single space (was fine)
    - 🕸 back to double space (was fine)
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit 3ca693b04afa865e186e892778560ec3f29389cf
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 02:48:05 2026 +0200

    fix(agentic-tools): 3-space padding for wide emoji on line 3, ⚠ drift space
    
    🛠/🕸/🏗 → 3 spaces; 🔌 → 2 spaces; ⚠drift → ⚠ drift.
    Wider gap absorbs WSL/Windows Terminal wide-emoji column miscount.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit cc871aa687c519077159141610d79c148eb2312c
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 02:44:39 2026 +0200

    fix(agentic-tools): compact last-commit time and informative stamps
    
    - Last commit: drop %cr git call, compute from LAST_COMMIT_EPOCH already
      fetched; format as 14s/6m/2h/5d (no 'ago', no verbose words)
    - Stamps: ✅HH:MM ⚠HH:MM ⚙️cfg — no internal spaces; stale now shows
      the artifact's actual last-modified time instead of the word 'stale'
    - Drift pattern updated: '⚠'* (no space) matches new stamp format;
      drift label compressed to ⚠drift
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit 487bae11bda2f7b27e02d79368f15ab92cb9a3c3
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 02:31:50 2026 +0200

    feat(agentic-tools): session duration, RTK probe, drift signal fix
    
    Session duration:
    - Primary: cost.total_duration_ms from payload (confirmed in ccstatusline)
    - Fallback: scan session JSON files matching normalized DIR_RAW (runs
      after git rev-parse so comparison uses real workspace path)
    - Format: compact 47m / 2h13m; placed inline with cost as 💵 $X ⌚ Nm
    
    RTK savings:
    - Conditional probe: RTK_DB_PATH env → ~/.local/share/rtk/rtk.db →
      ~/.config/rtk/rtk.db → AppData path
    - Queries tracking table for today's savings %; silent if DB absent
    - Segment omitted cleanly until RTK tracking DB is built
    
    Drift signal:
    - Remove ⚙️ cfg from drift trigger — configured-only is neutral,
      not a confirmed stale state
    - Drift now fires only on ⚠ stale (artifact confirmed older than
      last commit epoch); makes ⚠ drift a meaningful alert again
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit 5647bd8f1884bdec59fc534f5aba89c80ffe2c41
Author: Andrea Finazzi <andreafinazzi.info@gmail.com>
Date:   Sun May 17 02:10:20 2026 +0200

    docs(agentic-tools): sync spec with current script state
    
    - Layout §3: spaces between all emoji and text; 🕒 git: replaces
      ⏱️ Ultimo:; {LOCK} {BRANCH} with explicit space; double space on
      wide emoji (🕸, 🏗)
    - §4 segments: ⏱️Ultimo → 🕒 git:; skills local count now includes
      .agents/skills/ (171 files); ⚠ drift trigger pattern updated
    - §5 states: all stamps updated (✅ HH:MM, ⚠ stale, ⚙️ cfg, 🟢/🔴
      badges with spaces); GitNexus DB search adds .gitnexus/lbug
    - §10 examples: all four repos re-rendered with current format
    - §12 criteria: stamp patterns, .agents/skills/, .gitnexus/lbug,
      🕒 git: label checks added
